title: cracca oblongata
intro: Cracca oblongata, also known as round-leaved vetchling, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is native to various parts of the world and is recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Cracca oblongata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat urinary problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
